requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — INEN Conformity and ARCERNNR Grid-Connection Requirements for Ecuador
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——厄瓜多尔INEN合格评定及ARCERNNR并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——厄瓜多INEN合格評定及ARCERNNR併網要求

summary.en: Ecuador's standards body INEN (Servicio Ecuatoriano de Normalización) issues NTE INEN technical standards and RTE INEN technical regulations that govern product conformity for market entry. For solar PV inverters, the applicable safety standards are IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters), which INEN adopts as the basis for conformity assessment. A certificate of conformity to the applicable RTE INEN / NTE INEN standard is required before a PV inverter can be lawfully imported and placed on the Ecuador market. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering IEC 62109-1/-2 is the expected evidentiary basis for INEN conformity. ARCERNNR and distribution companies require this conformity evidence as part of the microgeneración connection application.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔标准机构INEN（厄瓜多尔标准化服务局）发布NTE INEN技术标准和RTE INEN技术法规，管理市场准入的产品合格评定。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，适用的安全标准为IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求），INEN以此为合格评定基础。光伏逆变器在厄瓜多尔市场合法进口和销售前，须取得符合适用RTE INEN / NTE INEN标准的合格证书。覆盖IEC 62109-1/-2的ILAC认可实验室第三方型式试验证据是INEN合格评定的预期证据基础。ARCERNNR和配电公司要求在微型发电并网申请中提供此合格评定证据。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多標準機構INEN（厄瓜多標準化服務局）發布NTE INEN技術標準和RTE INEN技術法規，管理市場准入的產品合格評定。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，適用的安全標準為IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求），INEN以此為合格評定基礎。光伏逆變器在厄瓜多市場合法進口和銷售前，須取得符合適用RTE INEN / NTE INEN標準的合格證書。覆蓋IEC 62109-1/-2的ILAC認可實驗室第三方型式試驗證據是INEN合格評定的預期證據基礎。ARCERNNR和配電公司要求在微型發電併網申請中提供此合格評定證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (adopted as NTE INEN basis for conformity assessment)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (parent standard, implicitly applicable)
RTE INEN — Reglamento Técnico Ecuatoriano (Ecuador Technical Regulation) applicable to PV inverters
NTE INEN — Norma Técnica Ecuatoriana (Ecuador Technical Standard) for PV inverters
ARCERNNR microgeneración regulations requiring INEN conformity evidence for grid connection

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a China domestic standard assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories, based on 50 Hz / 220/380 V grid conditions. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by INEN or ARCERNNR as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence. Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not a valid basis for INEN conformity certification for market entry into Ecuador.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估、基于50 Hz / 220/380 V电网条件的中国国内标准。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被INEN或ARCERNNR接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国安全证书，不是进入厄瓜多尔市场的INEN合格评定认证的有效依据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏並網逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估、基於50 Hz / 220/380 V電網條件的中國國內標準。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被INEN或ARCERNNR接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國安全證書，不是進入厄瓜多市場的INEN合格評定認證的有效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy INEN's IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test requirement for Ecuador market entry or ARCERNNR microgeneración grid-connection. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to Ecuador. Note that IEC 62109-2 safety testing must account for the inverter's intended operating conditions — if the inverter is reconfigured for 60 Hz / 120/240 V Ecuador operation, the safety type-test evidence should cover that configuration. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 must be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for INEN conformity certification and ARCERNNR/CNEL project review.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足厄瓜多尔市场准入或ARCERNNR微型发电并网的INEN IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至厄瓜多尔的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。请注意，IEC 62109-2安全测试须考虑逆变器的预期工况——若逆变器重新配置为60 Hz / 120/240 V厄瓜多尔运行，安全型式试验证据应覆盖该配置。在提交INEN合格评定认证和ARCERNNR/CNEL项目审查所需设备文件前，仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书须补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足厄瓜多市場准入或ARCERNNR微型發電併網的INEN IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至厄瓜多的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。請注意，IEC 62109-2安全測試須考慮逆變器的預期工況——若逆變器重新配置為60 Hz / 120/240 V厄瓜多運行，安全型式試驗證據應覆蓋該配置。在提交INEN合格評定認證和ARCERNNR/CNEL項目審查所需設備文件前，僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書須補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for INEN conformity certification (market entry gate) and ARCERNNR/CNEL microgeneración grid-connection submission; IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence is the required evidentiary basis
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy INEN's IEC 62109-1/-2 conformity requirement for Ecuador market entry. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting for INEN conformity certification. Ensure that safety type-test evidence covers the 60 Hz / 120/240 V configuration intended for Ecuador — not the 50 Hz / 220/380 V Chinese configuration. Verify current INEN technical regulations and RTE INEN scope for PV inverters directly at normalizacion.gob.ec and confirm ARCERNNR microgeneración documentation requirements at controlrecursosyenergia.gob.ec before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足厄瓜多尔市场准入的INEN IEC 62109-1/-2合格评定要求。请在提交INEN合格评定认证前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。确保安全型式试验证据覆盖厄瓜多尔预期使用的60 Hz / 120/240 V配置——而非50 Hz / 220/380 V中国配置。在启动测试计划前，请直接在normalizacion.gob.ec核实光伏逆变器的现行INEN技术法规和RTE INEN范围，并在controlrecursosyenergia.gob.ec确认ARCERNNR微型发电文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足厄瓜多市場准入的INEN IEC 62109-1/-2合格評定要求。請在提交INEN合格評定認證前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。確保安全型式試驗證據覆蓋厄瓜多預期使用的60 Hz / 120/240 V配置——而非50 Hz / 220/380 V中國配置。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接在normalizacion.gob.ec核實光伏逆變器的現行INEN技術法規和RTE INEN範圍，並在controlrecursosyenergia.gob.ec確認ARCERNNR微型發電文件要求。
